title: 7 Ways Pride Hides in a Godly Man
caption:
Pride doesn't always show up loud.

In a godly man, it hides in the serving that needs to be noticed, the advice given before it's been taken, the humility that's performed for an audience. It sounds like: "I'm just the worst." It looks like the volunteer who makes sure the pastor sees him, but won't apologize to his sister.

It prays longer in public than in private. It keeps score of every sacrifice. It resents the man who got what it was reaching for.

"God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble." James 4:6.

Which of these is the version of pride you don't talk about? Save this.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #humility #scripture #pride #christianity
